summary: OmniverseOS Alpha 0.9 RC sprint regression. Backend 13/13 functional pytest cases pass + 2 AI tests properly skipped (GEMINI_API_KEY intentionally absent — ENVIRONMENT, not bug). New /api/clipboard CRUD covered. /api/ai/chat/stream accepts the new optional `system` field without 422 (Cortex unification wiring validated). Frontend: all 5 sprint priorities work end-to-end via the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Zero console errors of severity 'error' on the boot path (auth → login → desktop → Cmd+K → Esc → Ctrl+Tab → Esc).

minor.issue: Return 500 with no GEMINI_API_KEY set — flagged as ENVIRONMENT per sprint note; not a regression.

testability_gaps.issue: Address-bar input has no data-testid; tests must fall back to placeholder='Search or enter URL…'. Recommend adding data-testid='browser-url-input'.

Selected result is styled via inline style only; no aria-selected attribute. Adding aria-selected={isSel} would help a11y + automated keyboard-nav verification (functionality itself works — ArrowDown/Enter handlers are correctly wired).

verified_sprint_priorities.P1_cortex_unification: PASS — Cortex Welcome Card renders 'Welcome back to OmniverseOS' with greeting + Dismiss; navigating in Browser writes URL into the timeline + memory; Mission Control surfaces github.com under Recent Sites + Memory after browser navigation; AIChat sends optional `system` to /api/ai/chat/stream (backend accepts, no 422).
verified_sprint_priorities.P2_workspace_restore: PASS — Mission Control side rail shows '// Workspace' section. Saving a named layout (mission-save-name + mission-save-btn) immediately renders mission-restore-named-TestLayout1 chip. After reopening MC, mission-restore-last is present (autoSnapshot captured).
verified_sprint_priorities.P3_universal_search: PASS — Cmd+K opens command-palette with placeholder 'Search apps, notes, tasks, memory, browser, workspace…'. Empty query shows 21 results across sources {app, action}. Typing 'github' after Browser visit returns BOTH palette-result-url-0 (Browser, URL source) AND palette-result-timeline-1 (Recent url visit). Esc closes the palette.
verified_sprint_priorities.P4_mission_control: PASS — Ctrl+Tab opens mission-control overlay with header 'Workspace Overview' and 280px Cortex side rail containing // Workspace, // Recent Activity, // Recent Sites, // Memory sections. Save + named-restore + restore-last all functional.
verified_sprint_priorities.P5_browser_intelligence: PASS — After navigating to github.com/facebook/react, browser-intel-bar renders 'Cortex Actions / github.com' with all 4 buttons (intel-action-review-repository / explain-architecture / generate-documentation / summarize-commits). Clicking 'Review Repository' fires exactly 1 cortex:prompt event AND opens the AI Chat window — does not silently call an LLM endpoint.

action_items: Add data-testid='browser-url-input' on the Browser address-bar <input> for stable e2e selectors.
Add aria-selected={isSel} on palette result <button> in CommandPalette.js — improves a11y and lets tests verify ArrowDown highlight without DOM-style inspection.
ENVIRONMENT only (not a code change): set GEMINI_API_KEY to fully exercise AI chat + image-gen tests.
critical_code_review_comments: MissionControl.js: 'Save current layout' input + button only render when visibleWindows.length>0 — correct, but make sure docs/tests note this so reviewers don't flag it as a missing feature.
CommandPalette.js: setSelected on onMouseEnter is fine; consider adding aria-selected to surface the currently-highlighted row for screen readers and Playwright.
Browser.js: 6 pre-existing react/no-unescaped-entities lint errors confirmed out of scope per sprint note — not blocking.
Server.py ClipboardReq schema present with sane min/max length — good. CRUD parity now complete across notes/tasks/events/transactions/memories/files/clipboard.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (added test_clipboard, test_ai_chat_stream_accepts_system; AI chat/image tests now skip cleanly when GEMINI_API_KEY is absent)

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 functional pass, 2 AI tests skipped by design)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 5 sprint priorities + bug-fix in Desktop.js (no console errors observed)

test_credentials: demo@omniverse.io / omniverse123 — already seeded, verified working.
seed_data_creation: None. Test created + cleaned up TEST_ clipboard/notes/tasks/events/transactions/memories/files entries inline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint priorities all green. Backend regression file /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py is the source of truth — runs in ~1s and skips AI tests gracefully when no key. For frontend, the Browser address input is NOT identified by a data-testid; use 'input[placeholder="Search or enter URL…"]' inside [data-testid=window-browser]. CommandPalette highlight is styled inline (no aria-selected) — ArrowDown handlers work correctly but cannot be verified via aria. Mission Control sections use CSS text-transform: case-insensitive substring search recommended (textContent is 'Workspace' / 'Recent Activity', uppercased visually).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues. The two non-blocking gaps (browser url input lacking data-testid, palette result lacking aria-selected) are testability suggestions, not functional bugs.
